title: Auto Labels — labels.yml
description: Schema for .github/labels.yml used by the auto-labels-action.

labels.description: List of label rules. Each rule defines when a label is added or removed.

checks.description: List of commit-status check rules derived from matched labels.

MatcherFields.description: Fields available for matching. All fields are optional; omitted fields are not evaluated.

title.description: Regex (e.g., '/^feat.*/') or plain string matched against the PR/issue title.

body.description: Regex or plain string matched against the PR/issue body.

comment.description: Regex or plain string matched against an issue/PR comment (issue_comment event).

commits.description: Regex or plain string matched against any commit message in the PR.

branch.description: Regex or plain string matched against the PR head branch name.

baseBranch.description: Regex or plain string matched against the PR base branch name.

author.description: GitHub login(s) to match against the PR/issue author. A single string or a list.

oneOf.description: A single glob pattern matched against changed files.
A list of glob patterns; matches if any pattern matches a changed file.
Advanced file matching with any/all glob lists and/or a count constraint.

any.description: Matches if at least one changed file matches any of these globs.

all.description: Matches if every changed file matches at least one of these globs.

count.description: Matches based on the total number of changed files.

mode.description: ALL (default): every defined field must match. ANY: at least one field must match.

label.description: The GitHub label name to add or remove.

removeOnMismatch.description: When true, remove the label if the include condition no longer matches (pull_request / issue events only).

include.description: When all (or any, with mode: ANY) defined fields match, the label is added. A label with no include is never auto-added.

exclude.description: When any defined field matches, the label is NOT added (overrides include). An exclude with no fields never excludes.

Check.description: A commit-status check derived from matched labels. Only emitted for pull_request events.

context.description: The commit-status context name shown in the GitHub UI.

url.description: Optional details URL attached to the commit status.

oneOf.description: A single description used for both success and failure states.

success.description: Description shown when the check passes.

failure.description: Description shown when the check fails.

labels.description: Label conditions that determine the check state (success = conditions met, failure = not met).

any.description: Check passes if the PR has at least one of these labels.

all.description: Check passes if the PR has all of these labels.

none.description: Check passes if the PR has none of these labels.
